# Sub-accounts | Backpack Exchange

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#why-create-a-sub-account)

Why Create a Sub-Account?

Sub-accounts give you more control by keeping funds seperate. They’re ideal if you want to manage different strategies, or capital without everything tied to one account.

Creating sub-accounts allows you to:

*   **Separate risk.** Losses or positions in one sub-account won’t affect funds over into others.
    
*   **Run multiple strategies.** Trade different approaches or portfolios independently.
    
*   **Move funds easily.** Transfer between your main account and sub-accounts for clear, simple capital management.
    

Sub-accounts help you **trade smarter and safer** by keeping activities organized and risks contained.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#how-to-create-a-sub-account)

How to Create a Sub-Account?

1.  Log into your exchange account, click the account icon in the top right corner, then click **“Add Subaccount.”**
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FAbNBIFeyTWITfRUHa6Rh%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db24366bd-1320-4edf-a21d-507aa0511092&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=2d96e049&sv=2)

1.  Create a username and click **“Add Subaccount”** again to save.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FiMwUQa5nFbwWZqKVYh9J%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc59ac7c6-17a5-46bd-8c5e-61cb90963842&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=661f8471&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#frequently-asked-questions)

Frequently Asked Questions

chevron-right**How many sub-accounts can I create?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#how-many-sub-accounts-can-i-create)

Each account currently supports up to **10 sub-accounts**.

chevron-right**Can I set different permissions for each sub-account?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#can-i-set-different-permissions-for-each-sub-account)

**Yes.** Each sub-account can be configured independently with different settings, such as:

*   Maximum leverage multiplier
    
*   Whether to enable auto-lending
    
*   Whether to enable notifications
    

chevron-right**How to transfer funds between sub-accounts? Are there any fees?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#how-to-transfer-funds-between-sub-accounts-are-there-any-fees)

*   **No fees for transfers between sub-accounts.**
    
*   Log into your exchange account, click the account icon in the top right corner, then click the **three dots** next to the account and select **Transfer In** or **Transfer Out.**
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FTFxUelwiHiR5wIr5IaGO%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D491ba1a5-8a17-412d-a682-e8abfdc85d5b&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=e6411bdc&sv=2)

*   Choose the corresponding token, verify the source and destination accounts, and then click **“Transfer.”**
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FK3N3ggPbNy7Df4NoWHvg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5654cea2-7013-4bd4-9606-a9d14a63a71e&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=563f3ba1&sv=2)

chevron-right**Can sub-accounts withdraw funds directly?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#can-sub-accounts-withdraw-funds-directly)

**Yes.** Each sub-account has its own deposit and withdrawal addresses, and users can deposit to or withdraw from a specific sub-account individually.

chevron-right**Do sub-account trading volumes count toward VIP level or fee discounts?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#do-sub-account-trading-volumes-count-toward-vip-level-or-fee-discounts)

**Yes.** The trading volume from sub-accounts is aggregated with the main account and contributes to overall VIP tier and fee benefits.

chevron-right**Can each sub-account have separate API keys?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#can-each-sub-account-have-separate-api-keys)

**Yes.** Sub-accounts can generate and manage their own API keys for trading and data access, with restrictions set by the main account.

chevron-right**Can I export trading records and reports for sub-accounts separately?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/sub-accounts#can-i-export-trading-records-and-reports-for-sub-accounts-separately)

**Yes.** Each sub-account has its own transaction history and report export function, which can be useful for auditing, accounting, or internal management.

[PreviousHow to Set Preferences and Notifications?chevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-set-preferences-and-notifications)

# Troubleshooting Missing Backpack Emails | Backpack Exchange

1.  **Ensure network connectivity.**
    
    *   Please make sure your internet connection is stable.
        
    *   In some regions, a global VPN may be required.
        
    
2.  **Check your spam or junk folder.**
    
    *   Then add the verification email address **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
        ** to your whitelist and try again.
        
    
3.  **Check if you are using a decentralized email (e.g., Dmail).**
    
    *   Due to differences in architecture and protocols, such email services may sometimes be misclassified or incompatible with certain platforms’ mail systems.
        
    *   If this is the case, we recommend following these steps to [update your email address.](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/how-to-update-my-account-email#how-to-change-your-backpack-exchange-account-email)
        
    

**If you cannot resolve OTP issues after verifying the above solutions please reach out to Support via [\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
**

[PreviousHow to update my account email?chevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/how-to-update-my-account-email)

# How to update my account email? | Backpack Exchange

At Backpack Exchange, protecting your account security is our top priority.

To change your email address, please follow the steps below and submit the required information to [**\[email protected\]**envelope](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#e794929797889593a78586848c9786848cc9829f848f86898082)
.

**Please note:** Email changes typically take **2–4 business days** to complete.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/how-to-update-my-account-email#how-to-change-your-backpack-exchange-account-email)

**How to Change Your Backpack Exchange Account Email**

1.  **Send an email to Customer Support**
    
    *   In the subject line, enter **“Email Change”**, **“Change Email”**, or similar.
        
    *   If you do not receive a reply from Support within 48 hours, please send a follow-up email.
        
    
2.  **Complete Sumsub Verification**
    
    *   After receiving a reply from Support, you will be provided with a Sumsub verification link.
        
    *   Access the link and complete the identity verification process.
        
    
3.  **Reply to the email and submit the required identity information**
    
    *   The information you need to provide includes, but is not limited to:
        
    
    **Name and Address Confirmation**
    
    *   Please provide your full legal name and current residential address associated with your Backpack Exchange account.
        
    
    **Source of Income**
    
    *   Please provide your primary source of income or occupation details for identity verification.
        
    
    **Transaction Details**
    
    *   Provide as much detail as possible about your account transactions, including (but not limited to):
        
        *   Transaction dates
            
        *   Asset names
            
        *   Asset amounts
            
        *   Transaction hashes or IDs
            
        
        The “Transaction Details” can be checked by entering the wallet address at [arrow-up-right](https://solscan.io/)
        [Solscan.ioarrow-up-right](http://solscan.io/)
        .
        
    

* * *

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/how-to-update-my-account-email#review-process)

**Review Process**

*   Once we receive your information, your account will be placed under a **48-hour security freeze**.
    
*   During this period, we will carefully review and verify your information to ensure account security.
    
*   After the review is approved and the security freeze period has ended, we will proceed with changing your email address.
    

* * *

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/how-to-update-my-account-email#contact-support)

**Contact Support**

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please contact Backpack Support at [**\[email protected\]**envelope](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#20535550504f5254604241434b5041434b0e45584348414e4745)
. We will guide you through the entire process to ensure a smooth and secure experience.

Backpack Exchange is committed to maintaining the **security and integrity** of your account. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation!

[PreviousEmailchevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email)
[NextTroubleshooting Missing Backpack Emailschevron-right](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/email/troubleshooting-missing-backpack-emails)

Last updated 2 months ago

# How to View Your Account Information? | Backpack Exchange

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-view-my-username)

**How can I view my username?**

*   After logging into your exchange account, click on your account in the top right corner to see the KYC name you registered with.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F8A5FhXy1JPUTNuJtjO7u%252Fe2a565058ef0a67094aad62182969a03.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df410ac86-a09a-4dfd-b61e-64e750cef556&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=6d1387ac&sv=2)

*   If you would like to view your **account alias**, go to **Settings** → under the **Account** tab → **Leaderboard**, where you will find your alias, and the alias of the account that referred you.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FI9b8AswPlnv8UxEVBQ25%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Db4df920f-ee79-4fa5-a5e3-aff05fb614b9&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=a4645ba1&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-change-my-account-name)

**How can I change my account name?**

The name of the **main account cannot be changed**. Only sub-account nicknames can be customized. To change it:

*   Navigate to the sub-account.
    
*   Click **Portfolio**, then click **Edit**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FZdoOXV1dmzm3HktlQmuC%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D98f73957-7c1b-49eb-995c-11cf13894e30&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=a05cf4cb&sv=2)

*   Enter your desired nickname and click **Save**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252Fc8oJYk7lhwCvKHIO8aku%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De5ee5206-c337-44f9-a2ee-8ef8ff27cf8e&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=992eae69&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-check-my-fee-tier)

**How can I check my fee tier?**

*   Go to **Settings** → under the **Account** tab → **Fees**, where you can view your current spot and futures fee tier.
    
*   Fee tiers are determined based on your trading volume over the past 30 days. Please refer to the [fee schedule](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/trading/trading-fees)
     for more details.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F29RawEixJtlfr2INJLhh%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7d005f19-6c36-44b0-add7-669df45f6d3a&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=40a83855&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-view-my-account-balance-sheet)

**How can I view my account balance sheet?**

*   After logging into your exchange account, go to **Portfolio** → under the **Account Overview** tab → click **Balance**, then click **Statements**.
    
*   Here you can view details such as assets, liabilities, and net equity for the sub-account.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FIyDo6NqpUoa1eHRBJat0%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7cf83ee0-c731-4eda-8b6f-8469b1bb1e46&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=b0d0f3be&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-check-my-recent-trading-volume)

**How can I check my recent trading volume?**

*   After logging into your exchange account, go to **Portfolio** → click **Performance**.
    
*   Select the item you want to view, check **Cumulative**, and choose the time range to see your trading volume.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F0zfvAMyWPnFpVpGFPjmO%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd754e13e-5821-4688-b12a-d0ecf5a96a52&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=bd9bbda7&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-change-the-display-language-of-the-platform)

**How can I change the display language of the platform?**

Log into your exchange account → go to **Settings** → under the **Account** tab → **Preferences**, then select your preferred display language.

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F9myYmy5LNwL56nAkmFY2%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D7ceaf733-8234-481d-8b19-0f74e2c49865&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=212d4b10&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-manage-my-notification-settings)

**How can I manage my notification settings?**

*   **Order Notifications**: When enabled, you will receive order notifications at the bottom right of the page, including successful order placements and executions.
    
*   **Audio Alerts**: When enabled, an audio notification will play after certain events.
    
*   **Mask Balances & Info**: When enabled, balances and account details (such as your email address) will be masked.
    
*   **Market Close Confirmation**:
    
    *   If disabled: A market order will close your entire position without asking for confirmation.
        
    *   If enabled: You can customize the quantity to close and view the expected PnL.
        
    *   _Note: Positions with a notional value above $100,000 will always require confirmation._
        
    
*   **Show Funding Rates Ticker**: When enabled, the funding rates ticker will be displayed at the bottom of the trading page.
    

circle-info

**Hover your mouse over the tooltip to view a detailed explanation of the term on the page.**

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FOurUDjhUrH7xD0PWITNM%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dcf388e27-946d-434f-8d1b-3485a6275cc3&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=ec535514&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-hide-my-trading-activity-from-the-leaderboard)

**How can I hide my trading activity from the leaderboard?**

Log into your exchange account → go to **Settings** → under the **Account** tab → **Leaderboards**, and enable **Visibility**. Once enabled, your activity will be hidden from the leaderboards.

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FGLuODvbH6jv7zKbPmM7w%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Df2981acb-f521-4646-8300-6144c5fda9e6&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=6030d489&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/account-functions/account-function-guide/how-to-view-your-account-information#how-can-i-add-my-contact-information)

**How can I add my contact information?**

If you would like to receive important updates or exclusive benefits:

*   Log into your exchange account → go to **Settings** → under the **Account** tab → **Contact Info,** click **Edit.**
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F2Wnk8qRVdAomkKExNntT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da7a4a5a1-bbfd-49da-8357-ed164474fd6f&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=af10f87b&sv=2)

*   Select a social contact platform, enter your username or phone number, and click **Save**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FD91OwHUkPrv38TONz6WZ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D972bae09-02cc-40c2-9223-05691b6090dd&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=1e0e766e&sv=2)

# Enable 2FA | Backpack Exchange

🔐 Enabling 2FA is one of the most effective ways to keep your account and funds safe. We strongly recommend activating 2FA immediately after registration.

1.  Log into your exchange account, click the **Settings** button in the top right corner, and select **Security**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FE0cPcXAsoebovDcQbyhs%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5b3364b7-a495-4b78-969b-4ee6cab524c4&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=4ecd4f61&sv=2)

1.  Under the **2FA** section, click **Enable**, then enter the one-time passcode (OTP) sent to your registered email and click **Submit**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FmMC0zVIxVsmmkdd2mjok%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D8607d224-cb3d-42ff-a3c2-7694f87d6dfe&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=449de152&sv=2)

1.  Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator), then enter the **Verification Code** in the field below and click **Verify**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F2hbIuGstdemdizcMNua9%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3c59961e-0e25-472a-a82b-d6bf69f60845&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=edb2c0e3&sv=2)

🎉Setup complete!

# Fixing Google Authenticator Code Errors | Backpack Exchange

The most common fixes for OTP (One Time Pass) code issues:

1.  Look for OTP code in your 2FA app **(not email)**.
    
2.  Sync your 2FA app device and Exchange login device to **the same timezones.**
    
3.  Do you have **multiple 2FA apps** downloaded? Make sure you're checking in the correct one.
    

**If you cannot resolve OTP issues after verifying the above solutions please reach out to Support via [\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
**

[PreviousEnable 2FAchevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/2fa/enable-2fa)
[NextReset 2FAchevron-right](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/2fa/reset-2fa)

# Sell Your FTX International Claim via Backpack Exchange | Backpack Exchange

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#overview)

Overview

Backpack Exchange has partnered with an independent institutional buyer to facilitate the purchasing of eligible FTX International bankruptcy claims through our platform. This service allows you to sell your claim and receive USDC directly in your Backpack Exchange account.

We have put together the following FAQs based on information provided to us by FTX Creditors. Kindly note that Backpack, however, is not affiliated with FTX Creditors and the FTX Creditors portal is solely provided by Backpack as a convenience for our users. We have no discretion, control or authority over FTX Creditors and how they adjudicate or pay out claim holders.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#before-you-start)

Before You Start

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#eligibility-requirements)

Eligibility Requirements

*   Valid FTX International bankruptcy claim
    
*   Access to your [claims.ftx.comarrow-up-right](https://claims.ftx.com/)
     credentials
    
*   Claim Amount > $500
    
*   Backpack Accounts with Verified KYC
    
*   Government-issued photo ID
    
*   Proof of address (dated within 90 days)
    
*   Additional documentation may be required for larger claims
    

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#what-youll-need-ready)

What You'll Need Ready

*   Email and password for [claims.ftx.comarrow-up-right](https://claims.ftx.com/)
    
*   Access to your 6-digit OTP authenticator app (required for automated process)
    
*   Required documents (listed above)
    
*   Active Backpack Exchange account
    

⚠️ **Important:**

1.  To use the automated claims process, please switch to an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator).
    
    1.  Log in to your FTX account and to to '**My Account'** → Click '**Settings'** (top-right corner).
        
        ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FHjxMZgVBYqnpecO6bPDE%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D66281535-bc1a-4de4-87b4-1b8f6dad665a&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=21c5ac86&sv=2)
        
    2.  Select '**Switch Device'** → Choose '**Switch to Authenticator'.**
        
        ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F7UEouVkPYhChr0aONni5%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D225c61c5-02da-4a31-aedb-7ef3841ac440&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=c094c136&sv=2)
        
    3.  Follow the prompts to enter your old and new 2FA codes, then submit.
        
        ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FDcZq2HPA9oRAsPH0jPj4%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D303bf54a-e8b6-4215-8753-ef87052086eb&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=d8119bac&sv=2)
        
        ⚠️ **Note:** If you currently use email-based 2FA for [claims.ftx.comarrow-up-right](https://claims.ftx.com/)
         , you'll need to switch to an authenticator app to use the automated claims buying process.
        
    
2.  Before accessing the claims page, please disable any auto-translation plugins.
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-by-step-process)

Step-by-Step Process

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-1-access-the-ftx-claims-portal)

Step 1: Access the FTX Claims Portal

1.  Log in to [Backpack Exchangearrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/)
     (web version)
    
2.  Navigate to **FTX Claims** in the top menu
    
    *   Or go directly to: [https://backpack.exchange/ftx-claimsarrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/ftx-claims)
        
    

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-2-authenticate-your-claim)

Step 2: Authenticate Your Claim

1.  Enter your [claims.ftx.comarrow-up-right](https://claims.ftx.com/)
     credentials:
    
    *   Email address
        
    *   Password
        
    *   6-digit OTP from your authenticator
        
        *   Email-based 2FA is not supported. Please switch to an authenticator app on claims.ftx.com first.
            
        
    
2.  Accept both required consents:
    
    *   You accept the buyer's Terms of Service & Privacy Policy
        
    *   You acknowledge that the claims buyer is an independent third party not affiliated with Backpack
        
    

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-3-review-your-claim-summary)

Step 3: Review Your Claim Summary

Check your claim status:

*   **Bid Received** → Total offer amount will be displayed
    
*   **Awaiting Offer** → You'll receive an email notification when ready
    

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-4-accept-the-bid)

Step 4: Accept the Bid

Review the offered amount and click **Accept** if you're satisfied with the price.

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-5-complete-kyc-verification)

Step 5: Complete KYC Verification

When prompted, click **Complete KYC Verification** and upload the following in the secure Sumsub window:

**Required Documents:**

*   Government photo ID
    
*   Live selfie
    
*   Proof of address (≤90 days old)
    
*   Additional documentation may be required for larger claims
    

After submitting your documents, you'll receive an email notification confirming the status of your KYC verification.

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-6-complete-and-submit-irs-form)

Step 6: **Complete and Submit IRS Form**

*   Click '**STEP 7'** to generate tax forms (_this option will not be checked for users who have not submitted_).
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FUkRqbESrVVUHoNqa2cot%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De8382e3a-83a0-424f-abe5-48df4323be09&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=2df652f0&sv=2)

*   Fill out the form as prompted.
    

⚠️ **Note:** If a user fails to submit the required documents within **60 days** of the second notice to submit it, the debtor _will_ attempt to expunge their claim as this is part of the _Pre Distribution Requirements_

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-7-sign-transfer-agreement)

Step 7: Sign Transfer Agreement

Complete the DocuSign Claim Transfer Agreement that will be emailed to you.

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#step-8-receive-payment)

Step 8: Receive Payment

After the buyer countersigns the agreement, USDC will be deposited directly into your Backpack Exchange account. You can trade or withdraw instantly.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#processing-timeline)

Processing Timeline

Claim Amount

Processing Time

**Standard Claims**

Usually within 24 hours from document signing

**Larger Claims**

May require additional verification and take longer to process

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#troubleshooting)

Troubleshooting

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#common-issues)

Common Issues

*   **Can't access claims.ftx.com?** Ensure you're using the correct email and that your OTP authenticator is working
    
*   **Account locked after failed login attempts?** Repeated incorrect passwords will trigger a cooldown period on claims.ftx.com. You'll need to wait for the lockout period to expire before trying again.
    
*   **Documents rejected?** Check that all documents are clear, recent (≤90 days for address proof), and match your identity
    
*   **Payment delayed?** Larger claims may require additional verification and take longer to process
    
*   **Experiencing errors?** Please disable any Google Translator plugins or browser translation features before starting the claims process. These can interfere with the portal and cause errors. Make sure to use the site in its original English version.
    
*   **Do NOT click the login confirmation email from claims.ftx.com.** Since the login process is handled on your behalf, clicking that email link will cause authentication errors and prevent you from accessing your claim. Simply ignore these confirmation emails during the claims selling process.
    
*   If you encounter an error during the process, wait **20 minutes** before retrying until you successfully proceed to the '**Email Verification Required'** page (or the next step).
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F7job2LwolUDimrp3iT0X%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da4fcf787-7161-482b-afcd-b60459ec42e3&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=55671e9f&sv=2)
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252Fz8Bbl4BUwk5oJlaMkAC6%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D4fe64233-f41f-42cf-8a13-0bc23f6fc51d&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=1cf7e784&sv=2)
    
*   When forwarding emails, **do not click any links** or the '**Reset & Continue'** button. Simply forward the email and **wait patiently** for the page to auto-refresh (this may take up to **20 minutes**).
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FjQfR6z95H2Bqmsa88Nrr%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D679aacd8-604e-46b2-9c80-7ee66aa8d3c8&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=f9d039f5&sv=2)
    
*   **Document Upload Requirements:**
    
    *   **Identity Verification:** Only a **valid passport** is accepted.
        
    *   **Proof of Address:** A **credit card statement** is preferred.
        
    *   **KYC Verification:** Ensure both your **computer and mobile device** are on the **same network** if used simultaneously.
        
    
*   If the page displays '**Manual Review in Progress'**, please wait patiently and monitor your email for updates.
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FeUO6GOK0VQQp2qZcKcTT%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1289459a-edc1-4fdb-a74e-11dfe3cbb366&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=294ecd08&sv=2)
    
*   If you see '**Offer Acceptance Failed'** or '**Claim Denied'**, contact **Backpack Support** and provide your **FTX account** and **claim code**.
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252Fo8hl9lRPyUl2akHV81TQ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D87069d48-b96a-43c0-a73e-bb00028dbf6a&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=cc4e135a&sv=2)
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#frequently-asked-questions)

Frequently-asked questions

We have put together the following FAQs based on information provided to us by FTX Creditors. Kindly note that Backpack, however, is not affiliated with FTX Creditors and the FTX Creditors portal is solely provided by Backpack as a convenience for our users. We have no discretion, control or authority over FTX Creditors and how they adjudicate or pay out claim holders.

chevron-right**Who is eligible to use this service?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#who-is-eligible-to-use-this-service)

Users who have registered on **claims.ftx.com** and hold a valid FTX International claim may proceed.

chevron-right**FTX Users Opting for the Bahamas Liquidation Process?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#ftx-users-opting-for-the-bahamas-liquidation-process)

If you wish to transfer your FTX claim payout assets to Backpack Exchange, you may also apply to sell your claim. Please follow the steps below:

1.  **Submit a Request:**
    
    *   Email [**\[email protected\]**arrow-up-right](https://mailto:claims@ftxcreditor.com/)
         and CC [**\[email protected\]**arrow-up-right](https://mailto:support@backpack.exchange/)
        .
        
    
2.  **Provide Required Details:**
    
    *   Include your **Backpack Exchange ETH mainnet deposit address** as the designated recipient for the payout.
        
    
3.  **Follow Instructions:**
    
    *   Proceed with the next steps as outlined in the reply to your email.
        
    

chevron-right**Which documents do I need to provide during KYC?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#which-documents-do-i-need-to-provide-during-kyc)

A government ID, live selfie, proof-of-address dated within 90 days. Additional documentation may be required for larger claims.

chevron-right**Are claims for corporate entities eligible for sale?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#are-claims-for-corporate-entities-eligible-for-sale)

No - only individual (natural-person) claim holders are eligible

chevron-right**My account is locked after failed login attempts. What should I do?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#my-account-is-locked-after-failed-login-attempts.-what-should-i-do)

Repeated incorrect passwords will trigger a cooldown period on claims.ftx.com. You'll need to wait for the lockout period to expire before trying again.

chevron-right**I'm experiencing errors during the claims process. What should I check?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#im-experiencing-errors-during-the-claims-process.-what-should-i-check)

Please disable any Google Translator plugins or browser translation features before starting the claims process. These can interfere with the portal and cause errors. Make sure to use the site in its original English version.

chevron-right**How can I determine the value of my FTX International claim before I start?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#how-can-i-determine-the-value-of-my-ftx-international-claim-before-i-start)

Use the customer-code lookup inside the FTX Claims portal; it returns an estimated face value based on court records.

chevron-right**My claim is under USD 10 000 — what options do I have?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#my-claim-is-under-usd-10-000-what-options-do-i-have)

Small claims may still accepted, but the buyer may offer a lower price or bundle them for efficiency.

chevron-right**Why is my claim marked “Disputed” or “Contingent” and can I still sell it?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#why-is-my-claim-marked-disputed-or-contingent-and-can-i-still-sell-it)

These labels come from the bankruptcy schedules. You can still apply, but the buyer may request extra documentation before making an offer.

chevron-right**Do I pay any platform fees to Backpack?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#do-i-pay-any-platform-fees-to-backpack)

No — Backpack charges nothing. We do not take any fees whatsoever and the services are provided solely as a convenience for our users.

chevron-right**What currency will I receive after the sale closes?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#what-currency-will-i-receive-after-the-sale-closes)

**USDC** credited to your Backpack Exchange account.

chevron-right**Can I receive fiat instead of USDC?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#can-i-receive-fiat-instead-of-usdc)

No. Once the USDC is credited to your Backpack account, you can withdraw USDC or send a USD wire from your Backpack Exchange account.

chevron-right**How long does settlement take once I’ve signed the agreement?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#how-long-does-settlement-take-once-ive-signed-the-agreement)

Generally, based on information provided to us, most claims are within 24 hours from document signing. Larger claims may require additional verification and take longer to process.

chevron-right**Can I sell only part of my claim?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#can-i-sell-only-part-of-my-claim)

Not at present — only sales of the full claim amount are supported.

chevron-right**What happens if my KYC submission is rejected?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/exchange-account/sell-your-ftx-international-claim-via-backpack-exchange#what-happens-if-my-kyc-submission-is-rejected)

You’ll receive instructions to resubmit clearer images or alternate ID.

**Still have questions?** Visit the in‑depth **FTX Creditor FAQ** for additional details: [https://www.ftxcreditor.com/faq](https://support.backpack.exchange/technical-docs/vn/)

* * *

# Reset 2FA | Backpack Exchange

To reset your 2FA, please follow the steps below and submit the required information to **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
**.

⚠️**Please note:** 2FA reset typically takes around **48 hours** to complete.

* * *

1.  **Send an email to Customer Support**
    
    *   In the subject line, enter **“2FA Reset”**, **“2FA Recovery”**, or similar.
        
    *   **Important:** The reset request **must** be sent from the email address registered with your Backpack Exchange account.
        
    *   If you do not receive a reply from Support within 48 hours, please send a follow-up email.
        
    
2.  **Complete Sumsub Verification**
    
    *   After receiving a reply from Support, you will be provided with a Sumsub verification link.
        
    *   Access the link and complete the identity verification process.
        
    
3.  **Reply to the email and submit the required identity information**
    
    *   The information you need to provide includes, but is not limited to:
        
    
    **Name and Address Confirmation**
    
    *   Please provide your full legal name and current residential address associated with your Backpack Exchange account.
        
    
    **Source of Income**
    
    *   Please provide your primary source of income or occupation details for identity verification.
        
    
    **Transaction Details**
    
    *   Provide as much detail as possible about your account transactions, including (but not limited to):
        
        *   Transaction dates
            
        *   Asset names
            
        *   Asset amounts
            
        *   Transaction hashes or IDs
            
        
        The “Transaction Details” can be checked by entering the wallet address at [arrow-up-right](https://solscan.io/)
        [Solscan.ioarrow-up-right](http://solscan.io/)
        .
        
    

* * *

**Processing**

*   Once you have completed the Sumsub verification and submitted all required information, Customer Support will begin processing your 2FA reset.

# Passkey | Backpack Exchange

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#what-is-a-passkey)

What is a passkey?

A Passkey is a modern, passwordless sign-in method that uses your device to verify your identity. It replaces passwords with cryptographic keys and device authentication.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#how-does-a-passkey-work)

How does a Passkey work?

When you create a Passkey:

*   Your device generates a **public key** and a **private key**
    
*   The **public key** is saved by the exchange
    
*   The **private key** stays securely on your device or Passkey manager
    

When you sign in, your device proves ownership of the private key without revealing it.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#is-using-passkey-safe)

Is using Passkey safe?

Yes. Passkeys use industry-standard cryptography and are designed to be more secure than passwords while being easier to use.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#frequently-asked-questions-about-passkey)

Frequently Asked Questions About Passkey

chevron-right**How do passkeys compare to passwords?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#how-do-passkeys-compare-to-passwords)

Passkeys work differently than traditional passwords:

*   They are unique to each account and bound to your device.
    
*   They use biometric or PIN verification on your device instead of something you type.
    
*   Because of this, they are less vulnerable to phishing and credential reuse.
    

chevron-right**Which devices and browsers support passkeys?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#which-devices-and-browsers-support-passkeys)

Passkeys are supported on most modern devices and browsers, including iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and browsers such as Chrome, Safari, and Edge. Support may vary depending on your device and operating system version.

chevron-right**Can I use passkeys across multiple devices? / What if I login from a new device?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#can-i-use-passkeys-across-multiple-devices-what-if-i-login-from-a-new-device)

*   If your Passkey is synced with a cloud service (such as iCloud or 1Password), you can use it on all your synced devices.
    
*   If cloud sync is not enabled, you can add Passkeys separately on each device. Each device will have its own Passkey for secure login.
    

chevron-right**Do passkeys replace Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#do-passkeys-replace-two-factor-authentication-2fa)

Passkeys can serve as a strong alternative to passwords and may reduce the need for 2FA in some cases. However, on certain high-security actions (e.g., withdrawals), additional 2FA may still be required.

chevron-right**Where are my passkeys stored?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#where-are-my-passkeys-stored)

Passkeys are stored securely on your device and may be synced via trusted services such as iCloud Keychain (Apple) or Google Password Manager. They are never stored on the exchange’s servers.

chevron-right**What if my device is lost or stolen?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#what-if-my-device-is-lost-or-stolen)

If your device is lost, you can still log in using your backup login method (password + 2FA) and remove the lost device’s passkey from your account settings. For maximum security, update your account credentials immediately.

chevron-right**Can someone steal my passkey?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#can-someone-steal-my-passkey)

Passkeys cannot be phished or copied like traditional passwords. Even if a someone has your account email, they cannot access your account without your registered device and biometric/PIN verification.

chevron-right**Can I turn off passleys after enabling them?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#can-i-turn-off-passleys-after-enabling-them)

Yes. You can disable Passkey at any time in your account security settings and revert to using your password + 2FA login method.

chevron-right**Are passkeys required for withdrawals?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey#are-passkeys-required-for-withdrawals)

By default, Passkeys are used for login authentication. For withdrawals and other sensitive actions, additional verification (such as 2FA) may still be required for enhanced security.

[PreviousReset 2FAchevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/2fa/reset-2fa)
[NextEnable Passkeychevron-right](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey)

# Enable Passkey | Backpack Exchange

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#web-or-how-to-enable-passkey)

Web | How to Enable Passkey


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#before-you-start)

**Before You Start**

*   Use a Passkey-supported browser (Chrome, Safari, or Edge)
    
*   Make sure device lock is enabled (Face ID, fingerprint, or PIN)
    
*   Choose a Passkey manager:
    
    *   System built-in (e.g. iCloud Passwords)
        
    *   Third-party (e.g. 1Password, with browser extension installed and unlocked)
        
    

> **We recommend enabling cloud sync. It does not reduce Passkey security and helps prevent login issues when changing, resetting, or losing your device.**

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#steps-to-enable-passkey-web)

**Steps to Enable Passkey (Web)**

1.  Log into your exchange account, click the **Settings** button in the top right corner, and select **Security,** under the **Passkey** section, click **Enable.**
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FpDNsR1t8kLMGTn9GduZP%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd7e013d8-eb01-4ace-bfb6-d61a1ad077b4&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=d0f6d684&sv=2)

1.  Enter the **6-digit code** from your authenticator app linked to your account, and click **Add Passkey**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FnkgoFOkVkLA4bqMYQb1K%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Ddbcdd53c-5932-4b81-9b52-70f8f7835445&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=f962bcb3&sv=2)

1.  Select your **browser’s password manager**, or set up your **device fingerprint or a PIN** to save your passkey for use on backpack.exchange.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FXWPimQmSiwu211xrHamk%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D3d89b22c-41b0-4806-b30e-88ab8cd97f4f&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=f6ac46f9&sv=2)

1.  Then follow the on-screen instructions based on your selected method.
    

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#app-or-how-to-enable-passkey)

App | How to Enable Passkey


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#before-you-start-1)

**Before You Start**

*   Update the exchange app to the latest version
    
*   Use a device that supports Passkeys
    
*   Enable device lock (Face ID, fingerprint, or PIN)
    
*   Set up a Passkey manager:
    
    *   iOS: iCloud Passwords
        
    *   Android: Google Password Manager
        
    *   Or a third-party app (e.g. 1Password)
        
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FFRRDl9iDxxjiQbnAoUIQ%252Fe3825ff11eb3471f93d6b7319ef4ffb7.jpg%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1987c7e6-fc74-4db3-b774-37ecbb3501ea&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=95ba51ac&sv=2)

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/passkey/enable-passkey#steps-to-enable-passkey-app)

**Steps to Enable Passkey (App)**

1.  Log in to your exchange account, click your **profile icon**, then select **Settings**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F62n7DJNcg2UieI5EDiWF%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D09ef18f2-c515-44cf-866c-6df2034e5f3d&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=7c07d169&sv=2)

1.  Go to **Security**, turn on **Require PIN/Face ID**, then click **Passkey Setup**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FZIvpyO2bHTPkCO0xI8D4%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D04fa65af-80c6-4349-b640-142fc5ae0445&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=c88fdf3a&sv=2)

1.  Click **Continue**, enter the **6-digit code** from your authenticator app, and click **Submit**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FJZJg7GKY6WguiQbpTADF%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D9d74331d-0d44-4395-9a72-ba2179423855&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=8e2b87fa&sv=2)

1.  Click **Add Passkey** — setup completed.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252Foa3g4UP0D1bw9UbgwZ6s%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd465fdbf-ae55-4696-bb20-7afcc09eb252&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=ce674324&sv=2)

# Reset Password | Backpack Exchange

If you’ve forgotten your password, don’t worry — resetting it is quick and easy.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/reset-password#step-by-step-guide-to-reset-your-password)

Step-by-Step Guide to Reset Your Password

1.  **Access the Login Page**
    
    *   Visit the Backpack Exchange login page.
        
    *   If you can’t remember your password, click the **“Forgot Password”** link.
        
    
2.  **Click on “Forgot Password”**
    
    *   After clicking the link, you’ll be directed to a new page.
        
    
3.  **Enter Your Email Address**
    
    *   On the reset password page, enter the email address associated with your Backpack Exchange account.
        
    *   Click the **“Next”** button.
        
    
4.  **Check Your Email**
    
    *   You’ll receive an email from Backpack Exchange with a reset link.
        
    *   Open the email and click **“Reset Password.”**
        
    
5.  **Follow the Prompts**
    
    *   After clicking the link, you’ll be taken to a page to set a new password.
        
    *   Choose a **strong password** that you haven’t used before.
        
    
6.  **Access Your Account**
    
    *   Return to the Backpack Exchange login page.
        
    *   Sign in with your email and new password.
        
    

* * *

🎉 **And that’s it!** You’ve successfully reset your password and can now continue using Backpack Exchange.

💡 **Tip:** Keep your password safe and consider using a **password manager** for secure storage.

# Withdrawal Delay | Backpack Exchange

**Withdrawal Delay** adds a user-defined waiting period to withdrawals **sent to new external addresses**, giving you time to detect and stop unauthorized activity.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#why-withdrawal-delay-is-needed)

Why Withdrawal Delay Is Needed？

Withdrawal Delay is a **last-line defense** against irreversible on-chain mistakes and unauthorized transfers. It creates a short, controlled window to **review, detect, and cancel** suspicious withdrawals **before** they are broadcast to the blockchain.

**What it protects you from**

*   **Human error:** Typos or copy-paste mistakes when sending to a **new external address**.
    
*   **Clipboard hijacking/malware:** Malicious software replacing the intended address with an attacker’s.
    
*   **Account misuse:** Unauthorized withdrawals initiated by someone who obtained your credentials.
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#how-to-enable-withdrawal-delay)

**How To Enable Withdrawal Delay？**

1.  Go to **Settings**.
    
    *   Open the **Security** tab.
        
    *   In the **Withdrawal Delay** row, click **Enable**.
        
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FEG6gbCS9zsMXwE7ylhKD%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D4c866cf8-775e-43cc-acac-6bbc7106d715&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=8fc0e3d1&sv=2)

1.  Choose a delay duration from the dropdown, then click **Change**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FH0ZYvETgXC67wHLRNkQk%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De2f2f046-05e0-491f-9f3c-a884c794c128&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=9cc71c9e&sv=2)

1.  Complete verification:
    

*   Enter the **Email verification code**.
    
*   Enter the **Authenticator app code**.
    
*   Click **Submit**.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FFLlaKAs48reYeasM3Ear%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc83178a6-85a8-4bfa-bbc7-d1d076516a71&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=b3c06b35&sv=2)

1.  🎉All set!
    

*   When you initiate a withdrawal, you’ll see a notice at the bottom of the page confirming that **Withdrawal Delay** is enabled on your account.
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252F7iplN8JklsC2AHrInevL%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D59a9061d-8a8d-48c2-ab51-92daa8d8f281&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=93a83f1d&sv=2)

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#scope-and-applicability)

Scope & Applicability

*   **Applies to:**
    
    *   Withdrawals **to external wallet addresses** that are **not yet saved** in your **Address Book**.
        
    
*   **Does not apply to:**
    
    *   **Internal/subaccount transfers** (processed immediately).
        
    *   Withdrawals to addresses that have already been in your Address Book **longer than the current delay**.
        
    

> **Definition — “New address”** Any external address **not present** in your Address Book at the time you submit the withdrawal, or saved **more recently** than your configured delay duration.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#how-it-works-execution-flow)

How It Works (execution flow)

1.  **Submit withdrawal** to an external address.
    
2.  **Eligibility check:**
    
    *   If the address is **new** (see definition above) → withdrawal is **scheduled** and held until the delay expires.
        
    *   If the address has been saved **longer** than your current delay → withdrawal is **processed immediately**.
        
    
3.  **Countdown:** A timer (e.g., “Scheduled for YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm UTC”) is shown in [**Withdrawal History**arrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/portfolio/transfers/withdrawals)
    .
    
4.  **Completion:** Once the delay elapses, the withdrawal is automatically released to the network.
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#best-practices)

Best Practices

*   **Pre-save** payout addresses and let them age past your delay to avoid operational friction.
    
*   Combine with [**Address Whitelisting**](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/deposit-and-withdraw/crypto/withdrawals/travel-rule-and-address-book#adress-book)
     for layered protection.
    
*   Keep [**Email & 2FA** factors secure](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security)
    ; review [**Withdrawal History**arrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/portfolio/transfers/withdrawals)
     regularly.
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#how-to-change-your-delay-duration)

How To Change Your Delay Duration？

Simply repeat the initial setup steps: go to **Settings**, open the **Security** tab, find **Withdrawal Delay**, click **Enabled**, and then follow the on-screen instructions.

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252Fx0kQEJlA5KTeoOZkIhrd%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Da9f30d4d-6312-4b3a-a6f2-92266aeb55c5&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=a9afa32b&sv=2)

⚠️**Please note：**

*   When you **change** the delay duration, the **new value takes effect only after the currently active delay window expires**.
    
*   Existing scheduled withdrawals keep their original release time.
    
*   Future withdrawals use the new delay once it becomes active.
    

**Example：**If you change the delay from 24h to 12h while a 24h delay is active, the new 12h setting takes effect only after the current 24h window ends.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#address-book)

Address Book

*   **Add Address:**
    
    *   You’ll receive an email notification confirming the addition.
        
    *   The **“age”** of the address starts at the moment it’s saved.
        
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FacbrzaDRUhkpPj4RJ8lR%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D04acafb7-bef3-4dd9-b0a0-a37801948182&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=8cea61a0&sv=2)

*   **Withdrawals to Saved Addresses:**
    
    *   If the address has been in the Address Book **longer than your current delay**, the withdrawal is **immediate**.
        
    
*   **Editing/Removing Addresses:**
    
    *   Removing and re-adding an address makes it **new** again (its age resets).
        
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#urgent-withdrawals)

⚠️Urgent Withdrawals

If you must move funds while a delay is active (e.g., operational urgency), please use the email address linked to your exchange account to contact **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
** and request the delay cancellation. Our team will verify ownership and assess options.

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#faqs)

FAQs

chevron-right**What happens if I shorten my delay right after scheduling a withdrawal?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#what-happens-if-i-shorten-my-delay-right-after-scheduling-a-withdrawal)

The scheduled withdrawal keeps its original release time. Your new, shorter delay applies only after the current delay window ends.

chevron-right**If I add an address and immediately withdraw to it, does the delay apply?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#if-i-add-an-address-and-immediately-withdraw-to-it-does-the-delay-apply)

Yes. The address must be saved **longer than your configured delay** to qualify for immediate processing.

chevron-right**Do API withdrawals follow the same rules?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#do-api-withdrawals-follow-the-same-rules)

Yes. Withdrawals created via API are subject to the same delay checks and notifications as the UI.

chevron-right**Does the delay affect fees or network confirmation time?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#does-the-delay-affect-fees-or-network-confirmation-time)

No. The delay pauses **before** broadcast. Once released, normal network fees and confirmation times apply.

chevron-right**Can I cancel a scheduled withdrawal during the delay?**[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/withdrawal-delay#can-i-cancel-a-scheduled-withdrawal-during-the-delay)

In this case, please use the email address linked to your exchange account to contact **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
** and request the delay cancellation.

[PreviousReset Passwordchevron-left](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/reset-password)
[NextI Suspect Unauthorized Access to My Accountchevron-right](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/i-suspect-unauthorized-access-to-my-account)

# I Suspect Unauthorized Access to My Account | Backpack Exchange

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/i-suspect-unauthorized-access-to-my-account#what-to-do)

What to Do

1.  **Change Your Password Immediately**
    
    *   Log in and go to **Settings**.
        
    *   Update your password with a strong, unique combination.
        
    *   Visit [Backpack Exchangearrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/settings/security)
        .
        
    
    ![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1790800155-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252F3kiM6CAFBZoTCJcZ8X7k%252Fuploads%252FwokQl4wkzEVtegflIRRQ%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D66100216-5bc8-42bb-81be-ca3cebe1eeb4&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=151dba83&sv=2)
    
2.  **Enable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)**
    
    *   If not active, go to **Security Settings**.
        
    *   Set up 2FA using a reliable app like Google Authenticator.
        
    
3.  **Review Account Activity**
    
    *   Check your transaction history for unfamiliar actions or transactions.
        
    *   Contact us at **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
        ** with details of your concerns.
        
    *   Include any unusual activity you’ve noticed.
        
    

* * *

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/i-suspect-unauthorized-access-to-my-account#recognize-and-avoid-phishing-attempts)

Recognize and Avoid Phishing Attempts

To safeguard your Backpack Exchange account, it’s crucial to recognize and prevent phishing attempts. Follow these steps:

1.  **Verify the URL**
    
    *   Always ensure you’re accessing the official site: [https://backpack.exchangearrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/)
        .
        
    *   Double-check the URL before entering any credentials.
        
    *   _Note:_ [_Official links to all Backpack Exchange and Backpack Wallet channels are located here._arrow-up-right](https://backpack.app/)
        
    
2.  **Beware of Unsolicited Communications**
    
    *   Be cautious with suspicious emails or messages claiming to be from Backpack Exchange.
        
    *   We will **never** ask for your password or 2FA codes.
        
    *   If anyone asks for them, they are a scammer.
        
    
3.  **Examine Email Senders**
    
    *   Double-check the sender’s email address.
        
    *   Phishers may use addresses that look similar but with small alterations.
        
    
4.  **Avoid Clicking on Suspicious Links**
    
    *   Do not click on links or download attachments from unknown sources.
        
    *   Hover over links to preview the destination URL before clicking.
        
    
5.  **Report Suspicious Activity**
    
    *   If you encounter anything suspicious related to Backpack Exchange, contact **[\[email protected\]](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
        ** immediately.
        
    

* * *

#### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/i-suspect-unauthorized-access-to-my-account#reminder)

🔒 Reminder

Your online safety is vital. By staying informed and cautious, you can protect your account and assets from potential threats.

# Troubleshoot Connectivity Issues | Backpack Exchange

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#troubleshoot-connectivity-issues)

Troubleshoot connectivity issues


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#id-1.-check-the-backpack-exchanges-official-channels)

**1\. Check the Backpack Exchange's official channels**

*   Visit Backpack Exchange's [social mediaarrow-up-right](https://x.com/Backpack)
    , it is the [official announcement channelarrow-up-right](https://discord.gg/backpack)
     if there are any reported outages or scheduled maintenance. ‍
    
*   Verify the status of Backpack Exchange using the [official status trackerarrow-up-right](https://status.backpack.exchange/)
    .
    

![](https://support.backpack.exchange/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.prod.website-files.com%2F669641f210a1019f2d8231fa%2F66df70364a73b1b9c783ad29_66df7013c20b2fc44c092679_troubleshoot_backpack_exchange_connectivity.png&width=768&dpr=4&quality=100&sign=fe0d85a9&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#id-2.-refresh-your-browser)

**2\. Refresh your browser**

*   Sometimes, a simple refresh can solve minor connectivity hitches.
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#id-3.-clear-browser-cache-and-cookie)

**3\. Clear browser cache and cookie**

*   Accumulated cache and cookies might cause outdated data or glitches. Clear them to potentially resolve connectivity issues. (Refer to our guide on "**How to clear browser cache and cookies**" for step-by-step instructions.)
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#id-4.-try-a-different-browser-or-device)

**4\. Try a different browser or device**

*   Switch to another browser to see if the issue persists. This can help determine if the problem is browser-specific. ‍
    
*   If possible, try accessing Backpack Exchange from another device.
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#id-5.-check-your-internet-connection)

**5\. Check your internet connection**

*   Ensure you have a stable internet connection. You can check this by visiting other websites or using online speed tests. ‍
    
*   Consider restarting your router or contacting your Internet Service Provider (ISP) if you suspect connectivity issues on their end. ‍
    

**If, after trying the above steps, you still face connectivity issues, reach out to us at** [**\[email protected\]**envelope](https://support.backpack.exchange/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#4734323737283533072526242c3726242c69223f242f26292022)
 **for further assistance.** **‍**

We're here to help ensure you have a seamless trading experience.

* * *

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#how-to-clear-browser-cache-and-cookies)

**How to clear browser cache and cookies**


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To clear your browser cache, follow the steps below for your browser.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#google-chrome)

**Google Chrome:**

*   Click the three dots (or vertical ellipsis) in the top right corner.
    
*   Select "More tools" > "Clear browsing data."
    
*   Choose "Cookies and other site data" and "Cached images and files."
    
*   Click "Clear data."
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#mozilla-firefox)

**Mozilla Firefox:**

*   Click the three horizontal lines (hamburger icon) in the top right corner.
    
*   Select "Options" > "Privacy & Security."
    
*   Under "Cookies and Site Data," click "Clear Data."
    
*   Ensure both "Cookies and Site Data" and "Cached Web Content" are checked, then click "Clear."
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#microsoft-edge)

**Microsoft Edge:**

*   Click the three dots in the top right corner.
    
*   Choose "Settings" > "Privacy, search, and services."
    
*   Under "Clear browsing data," click "Choose what to clear."
    
*   Select "Cookies and other site data" and "Cached images and files," then click "Clear now."
    

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#safari-mac)

**Safari (Mac):**

*   Click "Safari" in the top left menu, then select "Preferences."
    
*   Go to the "Privacy" tab and click "Manage Website Data."
    
*   Click "Remove All" and confirm.
    

* * *

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#my-backpack-wallet-screen-is-not-loading)

My Backpack Wallet screen is not loading


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If your Backpack Wallet shows a blank screen or won’t load, try the following steps:

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#extension)

Extension

*   Make sure the extension is updated to the latest version.
    
*   Turn the extension off and back on in your browser’s extension menu.
    
*   If the issue continues, reinstall the extension.
    

> ⚠️ Before reinstalling, ensure that your **Seed Phrase** or **Private Keys** are saved and available so you can re-import your wallets.

### 

[hashtag](https://support.backpack.exchange/exchange/security/troubleshoot-connectivity-issues#mobile)

Mobile

*   Check that the app is updated to the latest version.
    
*   Force close the app and re-open it (you may need to try this multiple times).
    
*   If the issue continues, reinstall the app.
    

> ⚠️ Before reinstalling, ensure that your **Seed Phrase** or **Private Keys** are saved and available so you can re-import your wallets.

# Crypto | Backpack Exchange

Crypto deposits and withdrawals on Backpack Exchange are processed directly on-chain.

*   **Withdrawals**: transfer assets from your Backpack Exchange account to an external blockchain address of your choice.
    
*   **Deposits**: bring assets from an external wallet into your Backpack Exchange account.
    

You can always check the **minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts** for each supported asset on the [Market Info Assets pagearrow-up-right](https://backpack.exchange/market-info/assets)
. This helps prevent failed transactions caused by sending amounts below the required threshold.

> ⏳ **Note on confirmations:** Deposits require a certain number of blockchain confirmations before they appear in your account.
